rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Deeming Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT FARHAT BAJJALIYA, AZIZEH BAJJALIYA, BUTRUS JAJEH Notice Of Motion For An Order Deeming Requests For Admission Admitted And Request For Sanctions Motion to Deem Admissions Admitted is moot. Substantially compliant verified responses provided prior to the hearing. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,000 to be paid within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Defendant to prepare order in conformity with this tentative ruling. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAUL L THIBEAULT VS. PATRICIA A DARK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT PATRICIA DARK, MARY CONNOLLY Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Cross Complaint GRANTED. First Amended Cross-Complaint to be filed and server forthwith. All amendments shall be underlined. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAUL VASQUEZ VS. NATIONAL DEFAULT SERVICING CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF RAUL VASQUEZ Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel OFF CALENDAR. Substitution of Attorney filed on February 2, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KIM MITCHELL VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, NA, A CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NA, A CORPORATION DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurer to cause of action for violation of CC 2924.12 is sustained without leave to amend - cause of action for declaration of rights regarding past wrongs is improper and injunctive relief is not a cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges HBOR violation re: failure to contact and/or failure to attempt to contact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE BROUGHTON VS. JOSEPH A BLANCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT JOSEPH BLANCO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Hearing Required. In the event the motion is granted, the following issues have to be addressed: (1) whether the Premises are currently occupied and (2) if unpaid expenses due under the TICA have accrued to date; Defendant to be ready to post any accrued amount. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC VS. CATHERINE HERRERA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 6. DEFENDANT CATHERINE HERRERA MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is continued to February 28, 2018 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLOW TREE INVESTMENTS, INC. VS. HAMZA BOUCHAFRA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday February 21, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT HAMZA BOUCHAFRA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)
